messages.content: {"2":"","UserId":"4e6dc755-3acf-48f9-961b-bb5a214343a8","Status":"Analyzed","Type":"Lab Report","promptvalue":"You are a medical document classification assistant.  Analyze the uploaded file carefully and classify it into exactly ONE of the following categories:  - Lab reports - Wearables - Health records - Patient intake - Encounter notes  Instructions: - Read the full document content. - Determine the single best matching category. - Return ONLY the category name. - Do not provide explanations, confidence scores, JSON, formatting, or extra text. - Output must exactly match one of the category names above.","isfilesavevalue":"yes","":"","doumentupload":"https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584220773348466429Document_2.pdf","Notes":"","doumentupload_name":"Document_2.pdf","doumentupload_url":"https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584220773348466429Document_2.pdf","createdby":"56211ac7-c7a0-44a5-9b53-3af4b04bad7a","createddate":"2026-05-23T09:45:33.868Z","updatedby":"56211ac7-c7a0-44a5-9b53-3af4b04bad7a","updateddate":"2026-05-23T09:45:33.868Z","gocameomodel":"PatientDocument","id":"0389b919-df75-4a6c-ac4f-8af963c0c96a","createdate":"2026-05-23T09:45:54.4680233+00:00","_rid":"xqw0APUgK5J4BQAAAAAAAA==","_self":"dbs/xqw0AA==/colls/xqw0APUgK5I=/docs/xqw0APUgK5J4BQAAAAAAAA==/","_etag":"\"010035e4-0000-0700-0000-6a1177520000\"","_attachments":"attachments/","_ts":1779529554,"aiagents":[],"highlightDataCard":[]}
